yaml.title: Research
yaml.subtitle: Overview of Research Interests and Selected Pulbications

markdown.markdown:
- **Fields of interest:** Comparative political economy and political process in advanced democracies (including Japan and Europe)
 - **Keywords:** Partisan Politics, Globalization, Economic Policies, Welfare States, Public Policies, Fiscal Policy, Protest Movements, Defence Spending, Environmental Policy

## Works in progress
 1. ['Revisiting Partisan Politics of Environmental Policy: How Labour Market Outsiders Weaken Left-wing Governments' Eco-Friendliness'](https://doi.org/10.33774/apsa-2024-9cfm3-v3)

 1. ['Household Analogy Revisited: How do Japanese People Respond to Government Borrowing and Assets' ](https://doi.org/10.33774/apsa-2024-6r28m) (with Susumu Annaka, Takaharu Saito, and Gento Kato)

 1. ['Paying for Defence in High-Threat Environments: Political and Economic Divides over Defence Spending Expansions in Three Ex-Axis Countries'](https://doi.org/10.33774/apsa-2025-jrp45)
 
 1. 'Who Can Get Reelected after Fiscal Adjustment? Technocrat Finance Ministers, Partisan Theory, and the Electoral Cost of Budget Balancing' (with Tatsuya Iseki and Susumu Annaka)
 
 1. 'Producer Right versus Consumer Left: Exploring Partisan Varieties of Environmental Policies in Advanced Economies' (with Serika Atsumi and Tatsuya Iseki)

 1. 'Survey experiment on public assistance in Japan' (with Susumu Annaka and Kohei Tabei)

 1. 'Do Accommodative Strategy and Strategic Ambiguity Help Social Democratic Party? A Randomized Factorial Survey Experiment in Italy' (with Tatuya Iseki and Antonio Benasaglio Berlucchi)

 1. 'Japanese Attitudes toward Pandemic Triage' (with Susumu Annaka, Takaharu Saito, and Gento Kato)

## Publications
::: {.panel-tabset}
### Articles
 1. Suzuki, Junpei. (2024). [A ‘leftist premium’ to protest movements?: How incumbent partisanship conditions austerity-spurred mass protest.](https://doi.org/10.1057/s41269-022-00283-2) *Acta Politica 59,* 124-144.

 1. (In Japanese) 安中進・鈴木淳平・加藤言人（2022）「[福祉国家に対する態度決定要因としての普遍的社会保障と逆進課税－消費増税に関するサーヴェイ実験－](https://doi.org/10.7218/nenpouseijigaku.73.1_212)」『年報政治学』72(1)，212-235．

 1. (In Japanese) 鈴木淳平（2019）「[グローバル化と党派政治―アウトサイダー層に着目した理論構築と法人税率のパネルデータ分析](https://www.jstage.jst.go.jp/article/nenpouseijigaku/70/2/70_2_208/_article/-char/ja/)」『年報政治学』70(2)，208-232．

### Misc
 1. (In Japanese) 鈴木淳平（2024）「[書評：久米郁男編『なぜ自由貿易は支持されるのか――貿易政治の国際比較――』有斐閣2023 年vi + 194 ページ](https://doi.org/10.24765/ajiakeizai.65.4_121)」『アジア経済』64(5), 121-124．

:::

## Research Interests

 - **Fields of interest:** Comparative political economy and political process in advanced democracies (including Japan and Europe)
